2603.28765.title: Adaptive Block-Scaled Data Types
2603.28765.paper_summary: NVFP4 has grown increasingly popular as a 4-bit format for quantizing large language models due to its hardware support and its ability to retain useful information with relatively few bits per parameter. However, the format is not without limitations: recent work has shown that NVFP4 suffers from its error distribution, resulting in large amounts of quantization error on near-maximal values in each group of 16 values. In this work, we leverage this insight to design new Adaptive Block-Scaled Data Types that can adapt to the distribution of their input values. For four-bit quantization, our proposed IF4 (Int/Float 4) data type selects between FP4 and INT4 representations for each group of 16 values, which are then scaled by an E4M3 scale factor as is done with NVFP4. The selected data type is denoted using the scale factor's sign bit, which is currently unused in NVFP4, and we apply the same insight to design formats for other bit-widths, including IF3 and IF6. When used to quantize language models, we find that IF4 outperforms existing 4-bit block-scaled formats, achieving lower loss during quantized training and achieving higher accuracy on many tasks in post-training quantization. We additionally design and evaluate an IF4 Multiply-Accumulate (MAC) unit to demonstrate that IF4 can be implemented efficiently in next-generation hardware accelerators. Our code is available at https://github.com/mit-han-lab/fouroversix.
2603.28765.paper_summary_zh: NVFP4 作為一種 4 位格式，因其硬體支持以及能夠以相對較少的每個參數位元保留有用資訊而日益受到歡迎，特別是在量化大型語言模型方面。<lb/>然而，這種格式並非沒有局限性：最近的研究顯示，NVFP4 的錯誤分佈存在問題，導致在每組 16 個值中的接近最大值上出現大量的量化誤差。<lb/>在本研究中，我們利用這一洞見設計了新的自適應區塊縮放數據類型，這些數據類型可以根據其輸入值的分佈進行調整。<lb/>對於四位元量化，我們提出的 IF4（Int/Float 4）數據類型在每組 16 個值中選擇 FP4 和 INT4 表示，然後按 NVFP4 的方式用 E4M3 縮放因子進行縮放。<lb/>所選擇的數據類型使用縮放因子的符號位來表示，該符號位目前在 NVFP4 中未被使用，我們同樣應用這一洞見設計其他位寬的格式，包括 IF3 和 IF6。<lb/>在用於量化語言模型時，我們發現 IF4 的表現超過了現有的 4 位區塊縮放格式，在量化訓練期間實現了更低的損失，並在許多後訓練量化任務中達到了更高的準確性。<lb/>此外，我們還設計並評估了一個 IF4 乘加（MAC）單元，以展示 IF4 可以在下一代硬體加速器中高效實現。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/mit-han-lab/fouroversix 獲得。
2603.28765.author: Jack Cook et.al.
2603.28765.authors: Jack Cook, Hyemin S. Lee, Kathryn Le, Junxian Guo, Giovanni Traverso, Anantha P. Chandrakasan, Song Han
